Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

CONFIDENTIAL — MNPI — Internal Board Memorandum (U.S. issuer; Reg FD applies)
Re: Project Blue Harbor — proposed acquisition of HarborPoint Diagnostics, LLC by Northbridge Genomics, Inc. (healthcare) with financing led by SilverGulf Bank, N.A.
Embargo: do not share outside the deal team until 07/15/2026 08:30 ET when the press release is scheduled to cross via GlobeWire.
Headline terms: all-cash merger valued at $312,000,000, representing approximately a 15% premium to HarborPoint’s 30-day VWAP; no earn-out.
Definitive agreements: Board authorization requested to execute the Agreement and Plan of Merger and the Credit Agreement (committed term loan and revolver); closing targeted Q4 2026.
MAC/MAE: current draft contains “no Material Adverse Effect has occurred since 03/31/2026,” with customary carve-outs and a negotiated MAE bring-down at closing.
Reg FD/10b-5: any pre-embargo interactions with sell-side must be wall-crossed; Ms. Elowen Dray of Firgrove Equity Research, LLC will receive scripted talking points only after embargo.
Compliance notes: do not circulate patient names, MRNs, account numbers, or household information; HIPAA/CCPA/GLBA restrictions apply to diligence materials and analyst Q&A.
Public-source references in the IR draft cite the MediMetrics Almanac 2025 and our FY2025 Form 10-K already available on EDGAR; those facts are public.
Trading controls: institute a blackout for all employees on the Insider List and add Northbridge Genomics, Inc. to the SilverGulf restricted list effective immediately.
lowercase pm: todo — finalize redlines, refresh the dataroom index, book the quiet-room for the wall-cross, and confirm embargo labels on draft slides.
Stale item: HarborPoint’s 2019 pilot with Avendale County Hospital was disclosed on its public website and should not be treated as non-public or material.
IR messaging draft includes safe harbor language; avoid forward-looking commentary on 2027 synergy targets until after the Form 8-K is furnished.
No selective disclosure: investor calls will be hosted post-embargo under open lines; media Q&A to be routed through ir@northbridgegenomics.example.
Contact for legal/compliance: Mr. Jonah Pike, General Counsel, jonah.pike@northbridgegenomics.example; or compliance@silvergulfbank.example for financing questions.
hr reminder: employee wellness spa day vouchers will be distributed next week and are unrelated to Project Blue Harbor; do not infer any transaction timing from that event.

uncertain.reason: Embargo schedule is legally sensitive but the allowed embargo_marker examples list words like Embargoed/Closing Date; timestamp alone may not be covered

Compliance framework reference signals disclosure controls but is not itself an enumerated marker
